About Me

Learning by building real projects and polishing the details.

My journey

I'm a Computer Science student focused on growing as a web developer. I enjoy turning ideas into clean, interactive experiences and improving a little with every project.

What I care about

I like interfaces that feel alive, readable code, and projects that show both creativity and progress. This portfolio is part of that process.

Projects

A few things I'm building and refining right now.

HTML / CSS / JS

This portfolio

A personal site focused on animation, responsive layout, and a cleaner visual identity while I keep learning frontend fundamentals.

UI Practice

Landing page experiments

Small interface exercises where I test layout ideas, color combinations, hover states, and better content structure.

Frontend study workflow

A growing collection of mini builds that help me practice JavaScript interactions, accessibility basics, and responsive behavior.
